## Please submit new request only if you and your project satisfy all fallowing requirements:

1. You can read and understand English
2. You can read and understand this requirements, which you are reading at this very moment.
3. The projects is hosted at github repo
4. The project is standalone software. It is not a wrapper/proxy to remote commercial/free service.
5. The project's age is AT LEAST HALF A YEAR
6. The projects IS NOT ABOUT AI agents. I do not put AI agent tools into my list. 

## Required information about the project

Just put here a link to github repo. You can also provide SHORT plain-text description (100-200 characters, no fucking emoji or markdown formatting or items list). If your projects is valid, it will be put into most suitable category in the list.
